message:
fix: resolve E2E test port conflicts and build args scoping

Changes from parallel agent fixes:
- Change port ranges from 3000-9000 to 33001-33008 to avoid conflicts
- Add ARG directive after FROM in build args test Dockerfile for proper scoping

These fixes were applied by parallel agents to resolve:
- TestE2E_PortForwarding failures due to port conflicts
- TestE2E_PortFormats failures due to port conflicts
- TestE2E_BuildWithArgs failures due to incorrect ARG scoping
- TestE2E_FullDevcontainer port conflicts
- TestE2E_RealWorldNodeJS port conflicts
